examples: Through stubby spinneys of akeake, I saw the bend of a river, as silvery as the underside of a fern.
A ladder fern springs from a crack in the 1979 lava flows from Kilauea Volcano on the Big Island of Hawaii.
The fern spike is the term given to this sudden increase in the abundance of fern spores blown into the oceans around the world.
One Netflix customer upset about the Qwikster plan was Jeff Portnoff, an information-technology consultant in Fern Park, Fla.
Fern Mallis, the executive director of 7th on Sixth, the company running Fashion Week, is looking forward to Wenlan's show.
